title: dampiera stricta var. oblongata
intro: Dampiera stricta var. oblongata, also known as the oblong Dampiera, is a flowering plant species native to Western Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Dampiera stricta var. oblongata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used as a natural remedy for various ailments.
